edition.dagbeeld: Het einde van het Iran-staakt-het-vuren domineert de agenda: Trump noemt de Iraanse leiders 'scum' en de spanningen laaien weer op, terwijl de NAVO-top in Ankara wordt overspoeld door zijn uitspraken over Groenland en de Patriot-deal met Oekraïne. Achter de grote geopolitiek tekent zich een breder beeld van westerse onzekerheid: over veiligheid, economische groei en de toekomst van de democratie.

article.title: Trump declares ceasefire with Iran over during angry broadside at Nato summit
article.summary: President calls Iranian leadership ‘scum’, rails against alliance, repeats demand for Greenland and threatens Spain

opening.note: Trump breekt openlijk met Iran-akkoord, noemt leiders 'scum' — NAVO-top in chaos.

article.title: IMF warns inflation threat looms large over global economy

article.title: Trump floats Ukraine Patriot production license ahead of Zelenskyy meeting

article.title: Denmark says it will defend Greenland as Trump threatens to revive NATO crisis
article.summary: Shortly after arriving at a NATO meeting in Turkey, Trump restarted the divisive fight, telling reporters that Greenland “should be controlled by the United States, not by Denmark.”

items.title: Explosions in Damascus during Macron's visit, one person killed and 36 injured
items.summary: Two homemade bombs exploded almost simultaneously on Tuesday morning near the hotel where the French president had just spent the night. Emmanuel Macron had already left for the presidential palace for talks with his counterpart, Ahmad Al-Sharaa.

items.title: In Iraq, huge crowds mourning Iranian leader reveal limits of U.S. role
items.summary: Some officials said the outpouring of grief was intended to show the continuing close ties between Iraq and Iran despite U.S. efforts to hold sway in Baghdad.

items.summary: Under investigation over an undisclosed gift, the right-wing leader Nigel Farage may end up in a special election against a candidate dressed as a trash can.

items.summary: Door de sluiting van de Straat van Hormuz wordt het voedsel in de supermarkt straks duurder, leert een nieuwe studie. Staatssecretaris Silvio Erkens (Voedselzekerheid, VVD) wil Nederland weerbaarder maken tegen zulke (acute) voedselcrises, desnoods door voedingsbedrijven te dwingen.
